description: CompositionBlue printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has long sleeves with ribbed cuffs, round ribbed neckline with a split V-neck, buttoned ribbed chest placket and split side seamsFitRegularWash careMachine wash with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleachDry inside out in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsThis simple yet stylish printed kurta from w has styles with ethnic Indian threads. Combining classic prints with modern cuts and slimming silhouettes, this Indo-Western kurta blends cut, colour and the vibrancy of Indian fabrics to create a garment that you can team with a churidar, salwar, patialas, leggings or even jeggings.Model statisticsThe product is a size S on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
